title: Smart-money vs the Street

quadrant_labels.3: Not recommending + Buying (FM ahead of street)

note: Analyst = LSEG StarMine ARM (analyst-revision score, 0-100). FM = our corp-action-immune net active flow; default window 3 months (persistence = conviction), latest month + breadth shown alongside with a 3M-vs-1M agreement flag. Deterioration axis is corp-action-aware: 'operating' = EPS and EBITDA both down (genuine); 'headline-only' = EPS down but EBITDA up (below-the-line/one-off, e.g. a demerger); |EPS YoY|>80% flagged as one-off.
